{{Quote|Welcome back to "A Galaxy Befuddled." Over the last two hours, I've offered you glimpses into the way these wondrous sea creatures live, and I've discussed the strange disappearance of their mother.....|Doctor A. Rahring|<ref name="r">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20021010rebirth|text=Rebirth}}</ref>}}
'''''A Galaxy Befuddled''''' was a [[holodocumentary]] filmed by the [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]] [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[A. Rahring]] in the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].<ref name="r" />

Rahring and his team researched about the [[Dorumaan leviathan]], an almost extinct oceanic mammal. Only two living leviathans were known. However, Rahring's documentary brought them to the public's attention.<ref name="r" />

Soon after the documentary was released, one of the leviathans disappeared. It was suspected that it had been kidnapped by [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Rufus Trammel]], who meant, it was presumed, to sell it to one of Rahring's fans.<ref name="r" />
